mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE TBL_HOST_IO_STAT DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select:
SELECT DEV_NAME as devName, TIME as time,
fs.title as title,
any(fs.title) as title,
IO_STAT as ioStat, RD_STAT as rdStat, WR_STAT as wrStat, RD_REQ_PS AS rdReqps, WR_REQ_PS AS wrReqps, RD_LATENCY as rdLatency, WR_LATENCY as wrLatency, UTILIZATION as utilization
SUM(IO_STAT) as ioStat, SUM(RD_STAT) as rdStat, SUM(WR_STAT) as wrStat, round(SUM(RD_REQ_PS)) AS rdReqps, round(SUM(WR_REQ_PS)) AS wrReqps
FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT t LEFT JOIN ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_SHARE_FILE_SYSTEM} fs on fs.name = t.DEV_NAME WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND t.HOST_ID=${hostId}
AND t.CLUSTER_ID=${clusterId} AND DEV_NAME in (select storage_pool_name from ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_STORAGE_POOL_CONFIG} con WHERE con.type in(1,2,9,10))
AND DEV_NAME =#{currentDisk}
GROUP BY DEV_NAME,TIME
ORDER BY TIME ASC

SELECT DEV_NAME as devName FROM (SELECT DEV_NAME,min(s) min,count(*) count FROM (SELECT io.DEV_NAME,
avg(${queryField}) as s
sum(${queryField}) as s
FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT io WHERE io.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND io.DEV_NAME IN (${devNames}) GROUP BY io.DEV_NAME,io.TIME ) t GROUP BY t.DEV_NAME ORDER BY avg(s) DESC ) t1 WHERE t1.min ${comparison} ${threshold}

SELECT DEV_NAME as devName, UTILIZATION as utilization, RD_STAT as rdStat, WR_STAT as wrStat, RD_REQ_PS AS rdReqps, WR_REQ_PS AS wrReqps, RD_LATENCY as rdLatency, WR_LATENCY as wrLatency FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT WHERE HOST_ID = ${hostId} AND TIME = (SELECT MAX(TIME)-${duration} FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT)

SELECT DEV_NAME as devName, ROUND(avg(RD_STAT),2) as rdStat, ROUND(avg(WR_STAT),2) as wrStat, round(avg(RD_REQ_PS),2) AS rdReqps, round(avg(WR_REQ_PS),2) AS wrReqps, ROUND(avg(RD_LATENCY),2) as rdLatency, ROUND(avg(WR_LATENCY),2) as wrLatency,any(CLUSTER_ID) as clusterId FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT t WHERE HOST_ID =${hostId} AND TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DEV_NAME in (select storage_pool_name from ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_STORAGE_POOL_CONFIG} con WHERE con.type in(1,2,9,10)) GROUP BY DEV_NAME

SELECT DEV_NAME as devName, SUM(RD_STAT) as rdStat, SUM(WR_STAT) as wrStat, SUM(RD_REQ_PS) AS rdReqps, SUM(WR_REQ_PS) AS wrReqps, any(CLUSTER_ID) as clusterId FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT t WHERE CLUSTER_ID =${clusterId} AND TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DEV_NAME in (select storage_pool_name from ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_STORAGE_POOL_CONFIG} con WHERE con.type in(1,2,9,10)) GROUP BY DEV_NAME
SELECT DEV_NAME as devName,RD_REQ_PS as rdReqps,WR_REQ_PS as wrReqps,HOST_ID as hostId FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT WHERE TIME = (SELECT MAX(TIME)-${duration} FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT)

SELECT TIME as time,IO_STAT as ioStat,RD_STAT as rdStat,WR_STAT as wrStat,RD_REQ_PS as rdReqps,WR_REQ_PS as wrReqps,RD_LATENCY as rdLatency,WR_LATENCY as wrLatency,DEV_NAME as devName, UTILIZATION as utilization FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT where HOST_ID =${hostId} AND TIME = (SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT WHERE HOST_ID =${hostId}) - ${duration}

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,ROUND(AVG(IO_STAT),2) as ioStat,ROUND(AVG(RD_STAT),2) as rdStat,ROUND(AVG(WR_STAT),2) as wrStat,ROUND(AVG(RD_REQ_PS),2) as rdReqps,ROUND(AVG(WR_REQ_PS),2) as wrReqps,ROUND(AVG(RD_LATENCY),2) as rdLatency,ROUND(AVG(WR_LATENCY),2) as wrLatency,DEV_NAME as devName, ROUND(AVG(UTILIZATION),2) as utilization FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT WHERE HOST_ID==${hostId} AND TIME >= (SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT WHERE HOST_ID =${hostId}) - ${duration} GROUP BY HOST_ID,DEV_NAME
SELECT DISTINCT DEV_NAME as devName,HOST_ID as hostId FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT WHERE HOST_ID =${hostId}
SELECT TIME, UTILIZATION FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND DEV_NAME =#{devName} ORDER BY TIME ASC

SELECT disk3.DEV_NAME as devName,
disk3.avg as ioStat
disk3.avg as reqps
disk3.avg as utilization
FROM (SELECT disk2.DEV_NAME, AVG(disk2.point_value) avg, COUNT(disk2.TIME) count_ FROM (
SELECT disk.TIME, disk.DEV_NAME, SUM(disk.IO_STAT) point_value
SELECT disk.TIME, disk.DEV_NAME, SUM(disk.RD_REQ_PS + disk.WR_REQ_PS) point_value
SELECT disk.TIME, disk.DEV_NAME, AVG(disk.UTILIZATION) point_value
FROM TBL_HOST_IO_STAT disk WHERE disk.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} AND disk.DEV_NAME in (SELECT pool.storage_pool_name FROM ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_STORAGE_POOL_CONFIG} pool WHERE pool.type IN (1, 2) AND pool.host_id =${hostId}) GROUP BY disk.TIME, disk.DEV_NAME ) disk2 GROUP BY disk2.DEV_NAME ) disk3 WHERE disk3.count_ >=${effectivePoint} ORDER BY disk3.avg ASC

select a.DEV_NAME as devName, any(c.title) as storagePoolTitle, any(b.path) as storagePoolPath, min(UTILIZATION) as utilization from TBL_HOST_IO_STAT a, ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_STORAGE_POOL_CONFIG} b LEFT JOIN ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_SHARE_FILE_SYSTEM} c on b.share_file_system_id = c.id where a.HOST_ID = b.host_id and a.DEV_NAME = b.storage_pool_name and b.type in(1, 2) AND TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} group by a.DEV_NAME

select a.DEV_NAME as devName, any(d.title)as storagePoolTitle, any(b.path) as storagePoolPath, min(a.value) as value from ( select DEV_NAME,
sum(IO_STAT) as value
sum(RD_STAT) as value
sum(WR_STAT) as value
sum(RD_REQ_PS + WR_REQ_PS) as value
sum(RD_REQ_PS) as value
sum(WR_REQ_PS) as value
sum(IO_STAT) as value
from TBL_HOST_IO_STAT where TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} group by DEV_NAME, TIME ) a, ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_STORAGE_POOL_CONFIG} b left join ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_SHARE_FILE_SYSTEM} d on b.share_file_system_id = d.id where a.DEV_NAME = b.storage_pool_name and b.type in(1, 2) group by DEV_NAME
